steps.t: Wilcome Tunnelly is in Scary, east of Brockenborings. The Plough and Stars Inn is in Brockenborings, west of Scary. Halson Tubwort of The Plough and S…
The goblins who stole the gypsum cart came from the Scrag-dells north of Brockenborings. It seems that goblins have the gypsum intended for The Plough…
